case_title: AVALON OCEAN AVENUE LP VS. SOICHIRO HIRAYAMA ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVALON OCEAN AVENUE LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HIRAYAMA, SOICHIRO DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 352 BRIGHTON AVENUE # 225, SAN FRANCISCO , SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94112, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210037088)
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE (TRANSACTION ID # 210037088) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALON OCEAN AVENUE LP
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HIRAYAMA, SOICHIRO
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALON OCEAN AVENUE LP AS TO DEFENDANT HIRAYAMA, SOICHIRO DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF AVALON OCEAN AVENUE LP
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $101.75 PER DAY. (TRANSACTION ID # 210037088) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALON OCEAN AVENUE LP

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 210037088) AS TO DEFENDANT HIRAYAMA, SOICHIRO DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
